zh.homeIntro1: 诺斯特拉达穆斯（Nostradamus，1503年12月14日—1566年7月2日），本名米歇尔·德·诺特达姆（Michel de Nostredame），是法国文艺复兴时期最著名的预言家，同时也是药剂师和医师。他出生于法国普罗旺斯的圣雷米，据说拥有犹太裔血统。
zh.homeIntro2: 1555年，诺斯特拉达穆斯出版了其毕生巨著《百诗集》（Les Prophéties），共收录942首四行诗（Quatrains），分为十组「百诗」（Centuries）。这些预言用晦涩的古法语、拉丁语及隐喻写成，据信预言了从16世纪到世界末日之间的重大事件。
zh.homeIntro3: 数百年来，诺斯特拉达穆斯的预言不断被重新解读。支持者认为他成功预言了亨利二世之死（1559年）、伦敦大火（1666年）、法国大革命（1789年）、拿破仑崛起、希特勒与二战、广岛原子弹、肯尼迪遇刺、911事件等。批评者则指出，四行诗语言模糊，可以被套用到几乎任何历史事件上。本站整理了代表性预言并进行验证分析。
zh.coreQuote: 「我花了很长很长的时间夜以继日地研究，将这些预言献给我亲爱的儿子凯撒·诺斯特拉达穆斯。这些预言全部源自神圣灵感的天文计算，将延续至公元3797年。」——《百诗集》序言
zh.kp2019: 2025年 —— 铁鸟无人驾驶，无声之声传遍世界（已应验）
zh.kp2035: 2026年 —— 东方结成新联盟，两条巨龙握手
zh.kp2038: 2030年 —— 第三位敌基督降临，血流成河统治二十七年
zh.kp2048: 2040年 —— 四十年不见彩虹，旱涝交替的气候灾难
zh.kp2060: 2060年 —— 神圣之言自天而降，伟大秘密终将揭示
zh.verifySubtitle: 对已到期的预言时间点进行真实度评估
zh.footerNote: 本站内容整理自公开资料，仅供参考与讨论。诺斯特拉达穆斯的四行诗语言极为晦涩，不同译本和解读差异巨大，许多所谓「预言应验」存在后见之明的嫌疑。验证评价仅代表编者观点。

en.homeIntro1: Nostradamus (December 14, 1503 – July 2, 1566), born Michel de Nostredame, was the most famous prophet of the French Renaissance, as well as an apothecary and physician. Born in Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, France, he was of reputed Jewish heritage.
en.homeIntro2: In 1555, Nostradamus published his magnum opus Les Prophéties, containing 942 quatrains organized into ten groups called 'Centuries'. Written in an obscure mixture of Old French, Latin, and metaphor, these prophecies are believed to foretell major events from the 16th century through the end of the world.
en.homeIntro3: For centuries, Nostradamus's prophecies have been continually reinterpreted. Supporters claim he successfully predicted the death of Henry II (1559), the Great Fire of London (1666), the French Revolution (1789), Napoleon's rise, Hitler and WWII, Hiroshima, JFK's assassination, and 9/11. Critics argue that the quatrains are vague enough to fit almost any historical event. This site compiles representative prophecies and evaluates their accuracy.
en.coreQuote: "I have spent long nights in study and have composed these prophecies for my dear son César Nostradamus. These prophecies are all derived from divine inspiration and astronomical calculations, extending to the year 3797." — Preface to Les Prophéties
en.kp2019: 2025 — Iron birds fly pilotless, silent voice spreads worldwide (Verified)
en.kp2035: 2026 — East forms new alliance, two great dragons shake hands
en.kp2038: 2030 — Third Antichrist arrives, reigns 27 years in rivers of blood
en.kp2048: 2040 — Rainbow unseen for 40 years, alternating droughts and floods
en.kp2060: 2060 — Divine word descends from heaven, great secret revealed
en.verifySubtitle: Evaluating predictions against reality for expired time points
en.footerNote: Content compiled from public sources, for reference and discussion only. Nostradamus's quatrains are extremely obscure, with vastly different translations and interpretations. Many claimed 'fulfilled prophecies' may suffer from hindsight bias. Evaluations represent editorial opinions.
